overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player walking through an abandoned covered market structure with a curved glass roof, exiting into a dusty post-apocalyptic urban street lined with abandoned vehicles and makeshift stalls, and approaching a massive construction site with a skyscraper and red smoke plume. The environment features industrial architecture, scaffolding, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned covered market arcade with curved glass roof

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market structure toward the exit

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing near a market stall, one walks away as the camera approaches

entered.detail: large curved transparent roof structure with metal framework spanning the arcade
vertical rusted metal beams supporting the curved roof
corroded metal wall with graffiti and weathered panels
large sign with Japanese characters marking the market exit
abandoned wooden stall with fabric covering and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an abandoned indoor market arcade with a distinctive curved glass and metal roof. Sunlight filters through the dusty panels, illuminating rusted support beams and a large 'AKEBONO' sign at the far end. Two NPCs stand near a derelict market stall on the left as the player walks steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty open street with abandoned vehicles and palm trees

events.description: exits the covered Akebono market into bright open air with dusty atmosphere

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered structure into the open street, scanning the abandoned surroundings

notable_agents.action: person standing near a market stall on the right side of the street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the dusty street casting long shadows
derelict red sedan with rusted body parked on the sidewalk
cracked asphalt street covered in sand and debris
dark colored van abandoned in the middle of the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The player exits the Akebono market into a bright, dusty open street. The transition from sheltered interior to exposed exterior reveals abandoned vehicles, palm trees, and makeshift stalls. The atmosphere is hazy with dust particles visible in the direct sunlight as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction scaffolding and makeshift shelters

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk along the damaged building with scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past NPCs working under makeshift shelters and scaffolding

notable_agents.action: person crouching near a blue van working on something on the ground
group of people gathered under a striped tarp shelter with belongings

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with broken windows and graffiti on the facade
bright orange metal scaffolding structure attached to the building
blue van with open doors and rust patches parked on the street
large satellite dish mounted on a structure in the distance
tall metal lattice tower with antennas rising above the buildings
makeshift shelter made of striped fabric covering belongings and people

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right along a sidewalk bordered by a damaged concrete building with prominent orange scaffolding. Several NPCs are visible working under makeshift tarp shelters. A blue abandoned van sits on the left while a communication tower and satellite dish are visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lot with abandoned tanker trucks approaching construction site

events.description: leaves the scaffolding area and enters an open lot with large tanker trucks

agents.ego_description: walking through the open lot toward the massive construction building and red smoke

entered.detail: row of large blue and white cylindrical tanker trucks parked in the lot
massive skyscraper under construction with cranes and scaffolding
tower crane attached to the construction building
thick column of red smoke rising from the construction site area
derelict orange and white sports car with gull-wing doors open
stacked blue metal shipping containers lining the right side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide lot filled with abandoned blue tanker trucks. A massive construction skyscraper dominates the horizon with a tower crane attached. A striking red smoke plume rises on the right side, becoming more prominent as the camera advances past shipping containers toward the construction site.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction site entrance with debris and damaged ramp

events.description: approaching the source of the red smoke with increasing debris density

agents.ego_description: approaching the construction site debris field and red smoke source

entered.detail: broken concrete overpass ramp with exposed rebar and cracks
scattered concrete blocks, metal pieces, and rubble on the ground
twisted metal framework and broken walls of a collapsed building

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the final approach to the construction site, passing a damaged concrete ramp on the left and navigating through dense construction debris. The red smoke plume is now very close on the right, billowing from the collapsed structures. The massive construction building looms larger ahead as the scene becomes more confined and cluttered with rubble.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered interior of a derelict market into a sprawling, dust-choked construction zone. It begins by moving through an abandoned indoor arcade under a curved glass roof, passing rusted beams and a large Akebono sign as sunlight filters through dusty panels. As the camera exits the market, the scene opens into a bright, hazy street filled with abandoned vehicles and palm trees before turning right along a sidewalk bordered by orange scaffolding and makeshift tarp shelters. The view then expands into a wide lot of blue tanker trucks, where a massive skyscraper and a striking red smoke plume dominate the horizon. Finally, the camera navigates through dense construction debris and a damaged concrete ramp, drawing closer to the billowing red smoke as the looming skyscraper fills the frame.
